Title: Iran announces alternative routes in Strait of Hormuz
Description:

Title: Homeowners offer reward to catch 'coastal vandal' after $25 million barrier slashed
Description: A $14k bounty has been issued in Nantucket’s exclusive village after confirmed sabotage.

Title: Israel's continued strikes in Lebanon putting strain on fragile US-Iran ceasefire
Description: Tehran warns it will respond it Israel doesn't immediately stop attacks on Lebanon, where at least 182 people have been killed.

Title: WTI, Brent, Iran accuse U.S. of ceasefire breach
Description: Oil markets rose after Iran accused the United States of violating elements of a two-week ceasefire agreement.

Title: Vietnam and China launch AI-driven tourism cooperation programme to promote cross-border travel
Description: Vietnam and China have launched a 14-day exchange and research programme in Nanning aimed at strengthening cooperation in cross-border tourism through the application of artificial intelligence, TV BRICS reports, citing VNA.

Title: Trump criticises NATO over Iran in meeting with Rutte
Description: US President Donald Trump vented his frustration with allies during a private meeting with NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte, as relations in the military alliance reached a crisis ⁠point over the Iran war.
